en: Thanks for coming in!\rDon't forget your stuff.\e\e\e
cz: Diky za navstevu!\rNezapomen si sve veci.\e\e\e

en: You don't have enough points!\rI can't sell you this!\f
cz: Nemas dost bodu!\rTohle ti prodat nemuzu!\f

en: Well, how about something else?\f
Darn!\rI'm out of everything!\fI guess I'll close up\rshop for the day.\f
cz: Sakra!\rUz nic nemam!\fAsi pro dnesek zavru\rkram.\f

en: Come back again!\e\e
Don't get discouraged!\e\e
Don't get beat!
Keep up the good work!\e\e
Do you want to save?\r\x17
All right! And I'll win\rnext time, too!
Mission accomplished!\rAwaiting orders!
Wahoo!\rEasy as pie!
Nicely fought!\rSee you again.
Done already?\rBetter luck next time!
Olaf's troops know\rno match!
Not bad, y'all!\rDon't be a sore loser!\r
Whew...\rI won! I really won!
Kanbei is victorious!\rWe shall meet again!
That settles that! It\rtakes brains to win!
cz: A je to! K vitezstvi\rje treba rozum!

en: Hm hm hmmm... I've\rstill got what it takes!
cz: Hm hm hmmm... Porad\rna to mam!

en: Another victory! Was\rthere ever any doubt!
I won this time!\rI can't be beat at sea!
cz: Tentokrat jsem vyhral!\rNa mori me neporazis!

en: Never give up!\rThat's my motto!
cz: Nikdy se nevzdavej!\rTo je me heslo!

en: What was that?\rA waste of my time!\r
cz: Co to bylo?\rJen ztrata meho casu!\r

en: Hee hee hee...\rHm? Broken already?
Heh heh heh...\rWhat did you expect?
You're not weak--I'm\rjust way too good!
My name is Sturm.\rHear it and tremble.
cz: Jmenuji se Sturm.\rSlys a chvej se.

en: Lucky me!\e\e\e\e
Hmm...\e\rTime to get serious!\e\e\e\e
C'mon now!\e\rLet's have a little fun!\e\e\e
Luck IS a skill!\e\e\e\e
I'm just getting started!\e\e\e\e
Pretty good offense.\e\rI'm not too bad, myself!\e\e\e\e
It's time for a tune-up!\e\e\e\e
I'll win for sure!\e\e\e\e
I'm all revved up!\e\e\e\e
I'm not worried! I can fix anything!\e\e\e\e
This is how I do battle!\e\e\e\e
Never give up, and never lose!\e\rI'm on my way!
cz: Nikdy se nevzdat a nikdy neprohrat!\e\rUz jdu na to!

en: Roll, tanks, roll!\e\e\e\e
Hey! Give up while you still can!\e\e\e\e
Now you're gonna get hurt!\e\e\e\e
Wanna test might? I won't lose!\e\e\e\e
I'm no show-off!\e\e\e\e
That's enough! Get outta the road!\e\e\e\e
Ready or not, here I come!\e\e\e\e
cz: At chces nebo ne, uz jdu!\e\e\e\e

en: Infantry... Assault!\e\e\e\e
All right! Time to end this!\e\e\e\e
You're not bad! Now it's my turn!\e\e\e\e
cz: Nejsi spatny! Ted jsem na rade ja!\e\e\e\e

en: In a test of skill, I'm unbeatable!\e\e\e\e
Stay cool, stay calm...\e\rHe who panics\e loses!\e\e\e\e
Let the winds of war bring snow!\e\e\e\e
Blue Moon is indestructible!\e\e\e\e
You're going to regret\e\rchallenging me!\e\e\e\e
cz: Budes litovat, ze\e\rsis na me troufl!\e\e\e\e

en: Neither man nor machine can\e\rwithstand the fury of nature!\e\e\e\e
You've got courage to face me,\e\rI'll give you that much!\e\e\e\e
cz: Mas odvahu postavit se mi,\e\rto ti musim uznat!\e\e\e\e

en: Ho ho ho. Do you think your\e\rpitiful troops can stand the cold?\e\e\e\e
cz: Ho ho ho. Myslis, ze tve\e\rubohe oddily snesou mraz?\e\e\e\e

en: Reckon it's time to take you down!\e\e\e\e
Where's the fool who wants\e\rto help me with target practice?\e\e\e\e
cz: Kde je ten hlupak, co mi chce\e\rposlouzit jako tercik?\e\e\e\e

en: Once you're in my sights,\e\rthere's no gettin' away!\e\e\e\e
cz: Kdyz te mam na musce,\e\rneutecete mi!\e\e\e\e

en: You can run, but you can't hide!\e\e\e\e
Don't get me all riled up!\e\rI wanna take things nice and slow.\e\e\e\e
cz: Nerozciluj me!\e\rChci to brat pekne pomalu.\e\e\e\e

en: No need for all the fuss.\e\rYou just calm yourself down!\e\e\e\e
cz: Neni treba se cuchat.\e\rJen se pekne uklidni!\e\e\e\e

en: Who shall taste my wrath?\e\e\e\e
Prepare yourself! Kanbei is here!\e\e\e\e
Your numbers mean nothing!\e\rNothing can stop me!\e\e\e\e
cz: Tva presila nic neznamena!\e\rNic me nezastavi!\e\e\e\e

en: My mind is honed for battle.\e\rThat is the essence of a samurai!\e\e\e\e
cz: Ma mysl je nabrousena k boji.\e\rTo je podstata samuraje!\e\e\e\e

en: I do not worry about that\e\rwhich MIGHT happen!\e\e\e\e
cz: Netrapim se tim,\e\rco se MOZNA stane!\e\e\e\e

en: You fight admirably, my foe!\e\rAllow me to show you my strength!\e\e\e\e
cz: Bojujes obdivuhodne, nepriteli!\e\rDovol, at ti ukazu svou silu!\e\e\e\e

en: Now you're gonna get it!\e\e\e\e
I see right through your plans!\e\e\e\e
Father, Sensei, citizens of\e\rYellow Comet! Lend me your strength!\e\e\e\e
cz: Otce, Sensei, obcane\e\rYellow Comet! Pujcte mi svou silu!\e\e\e\e

en: I'll show you there's more to\e\rcombat than power alone!\e\e\e\e
cz: Ukazu ti, ze v boji jde\e\ro vic nez jen o silu!\e\e\e\e

en: Watch me, and learn!\e\e\e\e
Number of enemy troops...location...\e\rGot it! This is so easy!\e\e\e\e
cz: Pocet nepratel...pozice...\e\rMam to! To je tak snadne!\e\e\e\e

en: The Eagle soars above you!\e\e\e\e
I have no interest in underlings.\e\rBegone!\e\e\e\e
All units, ready for attack!\e\rDon't even give them time for regret!\e\e\e\e
cz: Vsechny jednotky, k utoku!\e\rNedejte jim ani cas k litosti!\e\e\e\e

en: Speed is the lifeblood of battle!\e\e\e\e
Do you think you can keep up?\e\e\e\e
Heh heh... Impressive!\e\rYou had almost overtaken me. Almost!\e\e\e\e
cz: Che che... Pozoruhodne!\e\rTemer jsi me predehnal. Temer!\e\e\e\e

en: Wave good-bye to your troops!\e\e\e\e
Anchors aweigh!\e\e\e\e
Time to show you\e\rhow we do things at sea!\e\e\e\e
cz: Cas ti ukazat,\e\rjak to delame na mori!\e\e\e\e

en: Panic is for landlubbers!\e\e\e\e
I'm a nautical know-it-all!\e\e\e\e
Prepare to be washed away!\e\e\e\e
You will tremble before my power!\e\e\e\e
cz: Budes se chvet pred mou silou!\e\e\e\e

en: Fear is all you have left...\e\e\e\e
You shall not survive!\e\e\e\e
Prepare to embrace darkness!\e\e\e\e
Such power... I regret crushing it.\e\e\e\e
cz: Takova sila... Litost, ze ji drtim.\e\e\e\e

en: Burning earth!!!
Try this on for size!\e\e\e\e
Grrrrrraaaaaaa!\e\rI'm outta control!\e\e\e\e
I'm gonna smash you good!\e\e\e\e
Crushing stuff's what I do best!\e\rYou got a problem with that?!?\e\e\e\e
cz: Drceni mi jde nejlip!\e\rMas s tim problem?!?\e\e\e\e

en: Why think when you can fight!?\e\e\e\e
Stay outta my way!\e\e\e\e
Can you survive my attack?\e\e\e\e
Tee hee! C'mon! Let's play!\e\e\e\e
cz: Chi chi! No tak! Pojdme si hrat!\e\e\e\e

en: I've had enough!\rI'm bored now!\e\e\e\e\r
You're no fun... I don't like you at all!\e\e\e\e
cz: Vubec te neuzijes... Nemam te rada!\e\e\e\e

en: You want to match wits with me?\e\rYou're so silly!\e\e\e\e
cz: Chces se se mnou merit chytrosti?\e\rTy jsi ale hloupy!\e\e\e\e

en: Ooh! You're so annoying!\e\rI'm gonna have to get rid of you now!\e\e\e\e
cz: Ooh! Ty jsi ale otravny!\e\rTed se te budu muset zbavit!\e\e\e\e

en: Heh heh heh... I'm going\e\rto enjoy breaking you!\e\e\e\e
cz: Che che che... Uziju si\e\rtve zlomeni!\e\e\e\e

en: The look of terror on your face...\e\rIt's absolutely delicious!\e\e\e\e
cz: Ten vyraz hruzy v tve tvari...\e\rJe naprosto lahodny!\e\e\e\e

en: Heh heh heh...\e\rCan't a guy have a little fun!?\e\e\e\e
cz: Che che che...\e\rNemuze se clovek trochu pobavit!?\e\e\e\e

en: Heh heh heh...\e\rIt only hurts for a moment.\e\e\e\e
cz: Che che che...\e\rBoli to jen chvilku.\e\e\e\e

en: A battle with me is a greater\e\rhonor than you deserve!\e\e\e\e
cz: Boj se mnou je vetsi cest,\e\rnez si zaslouzis!\e\e\e\e

en: Heh heh heh...\e\rKneel before Adder!\e\e\e\e
This is the end.\e\e\e\e
Farewell.\e\e\e\e
I give you credit for\e\rpushing me this far.\e\e\e\e
cz: Uznavam, ze jsi me\e\rdohnal az sem.\e\e\e\e

en: To be defeated is to lose everything.\e\rAre you prepared for that outcome?\e\e\e\e
cz: Byt porazen znamena ztratit vse.\e\rJsi na takovy konec pripraven?\e\e\e\e

en: Victory goes to the better combatant.\e\rIt's a simple truth.\e\e\e\e
cz: Vitezstvi nalezi lepsimu bojovniku.\e\rJe to prosta pravda.\e\e\e\e

en: Impressive....\e\rI will remember your skill!\e\e\e\e
How's business?\e\e\e\e
Come by and buy something!\e\e\e\e
cz: Zastav se a neco si kup!\e\e\e\e

en: You can call me Hachi, the\e\rbest CO there ever was!\e\e\e\e
cz: Rikej mi Hachi, nejlepsi\e\rvelitel vsech dob!\e\e\e\e

en: No need to get all worked up!\e\e\e\e
This brings back memories!\e\e\e\e
Runnin' away won't prove anything!\e\rStand your ground, soldier!\e\e\e\e
Let me show you the power of money!\e\e\e\e
People of Blue Moon!\e\rI need your help!\e\e\e\e
Money buys power!!!\e\e\e\e
Don't underestimate me\e\rbecause I'm new!\e\e\e\e
cz: Nepodcenuj me jen proto,\e\rze jsem novy!\e\e\e\e

en: When the time comes, I do my duty!\e\e\e\e
cz: Az prijde cas, splnim svou povinnost!\e\e\e\e

en: This is not a drill...\e\rI won't give up so easily!\e\e\e\e
cz: Toto neni cviceni...\e\rTak snadno se nevzdam!\e\e\e\e

en: I won't let this chance pass me by!\e\e\e\e
All at once now!\rPress on!\e\e\e\e
Battle should never be taken lightly.\e\rI always give 100%! Always!!!\e\e\e\e
cz: Boj se nikdy nesmi brat na lehkou vahu.\e\rVzdy davam 100%! Vzdy!!!\e\e\e\e

en: I'll survive this battle, too! Believe me!\e\e\e\e
cz: I tuhle bitvu prezivu! Ver mi!\e\e\e\e

en: It's simply a matter of being the best!\e\e\e\e
cz: Proste jde o to byt nejlepsi!\e\e\e\e

en: You're a formidable opponent,\e\rbut that doesn't mean I'll lose!\e\e\e\e
cz: Jsi obavany soupere,\e\rale to neznamena, ze prohraju!\e\e\e\e

en: I've still got what it takes to\e\rdefeat you youngsters!\e\e\e\e
cz: Porad mam na to, abych\e\rporazil vas mladiky!\e\e\e\e

en: Paratroopers! Prepare to jump!\e\e\e\e
Ha ha hah!\rThis will be a crushing victory!\e\e\e\e
cz: Ha ha hah!\rTohle bude drtive vitezstvi!\e\e\e\e

en: See what experience\e\rcan do for you!?\e\e\e\e
You put up a good fight,\e\rbut this is the end!\e\e\e\e
cz: Bojoval jsi dobre,\e\rale toto je konec!\e\e\e\e

en: Nothing good ever comes from war...\e\rWhen this is done, let's go home.\e\e\e\e
cz: Z valky nikdy nevzejde nic dobreho...\e\rAz to skonci, pojdme domu.\e\e\e\e

en: This is the unit's\rmovement range. It can\rcover most terrain at a\rmovement cost of one.
cz: Toto je dosah pohybu\rjednotky. Vetsinu terenu\rzdola za cenu pohybu\rjedna.

en: This is the unit's\rmovement range. As it\rmoves on tires, it has\rtrouble on plains.
cz: Toto je dosah pohybu\rjednotky. Jede na kolech,\rtakze ma potize\rna plani.

en: This is the unit's\rmovement range. Its\rtreads allow it to move\ron plains unhindered.
cz: Toto je dosah pohybu\rjednotky. Pasy ji\rdovoluji pohyb po plani\rbez prekazek.

en: This is an air unit.\rTerrain does not\raffect its movement\rrange.
cz: Toto je vzdusna\rjednotka. Teren\rneovlivnuje jeji\rdosah pohybu.

en: This is a naval unit.\rThis is its movement\rrange across open\rwater and reefs.
cz: Toto je namorni\rjednotka. Toto je jeji\rdosah pohybu po vode\ra utesech.

en: This is a transport\runit's movement\rrange. These units\rcan move over reefs.
cz: Toto je dosah pohybu\rtransportni jednotky.\rTyto jednotky se umi\rpohybovat po utesech.

en: This is the unit's\rvision range. This\rincreases when the\runit climbs a mountain.
cz: Toto je dohled\rjednotky. Zvetsi se,\rkdyz jednotka vystoupi\rna horu.

en: This is the unit's vision\rrange. It's how far the\runit can see in Fog\rof War.
cz: Toto je dohled jednotky.\rUrcuje, jak daleko vidi\rv Mlze valky.

en: This is the current fuel\ramount. The unit can no\rlonger move when all the\rfuel is used.
cz: Toto je aktualni stav\rpaliva. Jednotka se\rnemuze hybat, kdyz\rpalivo dojde.

en: This is the current fuel\ramount. It's used at 5\runits per turn. Units\rcrash when out of fuel.
cz: Toto je aktualni stav\rpaliva. Spotreba 5\rjednotek za tah. Bez\rpaliva se zriti.

en: This is the current fuel\ramount. It's used at 2\runits per turn. Units\rcrash when out of fuel.
cz: Toto je aktualni stav\rpaliva. Spotreba 2\rjednotek za tah. Bez\rpaliva se zriti.

en: This is the current fuel\ramount. It's used at 1\runit per turn. Units\rsink when out of fuel.
cz: Toto je aktualni stav\rpaliva. Spotreba 1\rjednotky za tah. Bez\rpaliva se potopi.

en: No primary weapon\ris equipped.
This is the primary\rweapon. It can \x83fire\x80\ron the units below.
cz: Toto je primarni\rzbran. Muze \x83palit\x80\rna jednotky nize.

en: This is the amount of\rprimary weapon ammo.\rSecondary weapons are\rused when it's gone.
cz: Toto je mnozstvi\rmunice primarni zbrane.\rPo vycerpani se pouziva\rsekundarni zbran.

en: The symbol on the unit\rindicates the\rpotential to hit\rthis unit type.
cz: Symbol na jednotce\rurcuje sanci zasahnout\rtento typ jednotky.

en: The symbol on the unit\rindicates the\rpotential to hit\rthis unit type.
cz: Symbol na jednotce\rurcuje sanci zasahnout\rtento typ jednotky.

en: The symbol on the unit\rindicates the\rpotential to hit\rthis unit type.
cz: Symbol na jednotce\rurcuje sanci zasahnout\rtento typ jednotky.

en: The symbol on the unit\rshows hit potential.\rThis weapon can't \x83fire\x80\ron submerged \x82subs\x80.
cz: Symbol na jednotce\rurcuje sanci zasahu.\rTato zbran nemuze \x83palit\x80\rna ponorene \x82ponorky\x80.

en: The secondary weapon\ris the machine gun.
These are new weapons\rdeveloped by Black Hole.\rThey are more powerful\rthan Md tanks.
cz: Toto jsou nove zbrane\rvyvinute Black Hole.\rJsou silnejsi nez\rMd tanky.

en: If you want to win, capture the enemy\rHQ or defeat all the enemy units.\f
cz: Chces-li vyhrat, obsad neprijatelske\rHQ nebo znic vsechny nepratelske jednotky.\f

en: To win here, capture the enemy HQ\ror defeat all the enemy troops.\fGood luck and move out!\f
cz: K vitezstvi obsad neprijatelske HQ\rnebo poraz vsechny nepratelske oddily.\fHodne stesti a vpred!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or defeat\rall the enemy forces to win.\fThat's your mission!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily a vyhrajes.\fTo je tvoje mise!\f

en: Seize the enemy HQ or defeat all\rthe enemy units to clear this map.\f
cz: Zaber neprijatelske HQ nebo znic\rvsechny jednotky a dokoncis mapu.\f

en: Flak's forces are moving in...\fCapture Lash's HQ within 7 days or\rdefeat all of her troops to win!\f
cz: Flakovy sily se blizi...\fObsad Lashino HQ do 7 dni nebo\rporaz vsechny jeji oddily a vyhrajes!\f

en: The Black Cannon must be destroyed\rto win here! There's no need to panic.\fFocus on the objective, and move out!\f
cz: K vitezstvi musis znicit Black\rCannon! Neni treba panikarit.\fSoustred se na cil a vpred!\f

en: Capture the enemy lab or destroy\rthe enemy units in 7 days to win!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelskou lab nebo znic\rjednotky do 7 dni a vyhrajes!\f

en: We've finally arrived! All we need\rto worry about is that pipe!\f
cz: Konecne jsme tu! Stara se musime\rjen o to potrubi!\f

en: Defeat all the enemy forces or\rcapture the enemy HQ to win here.\f
cz: Poraz vsechny nepratelske sily nebo\robsad neprijatelske HQ a vyhrajes.\f

en: To win here, defeat all the enemy\rtroops. Pay attention to those woods!\f
cz: K vitezstvi poraz vsechny\rnepratelske oddily. Pozor na ten les!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or defeat\rall the enemy forces for victory!\fGood luck!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily a vyhrajes!\fHodne stesti!\f

en: Capture the cities around the giant\rmissile silo within 15 days.\fIf you can do that, victory is yours!\f
cz: Obsad mesta kolem obriho\rraketoveho sila do 15 dni.\fKdyz to dokazes, vitezstvi je tve!\f

en: All you need to do here is protect\ryour HQ for 14 days!\f
cz: Stari jen ochranit sve\rHQ po 14 dni!\f

en: Move a unit onto your HQ, or\rdefeat all enemy units.\fThat's all it takes to win!\f
cz: Premisti jednotku na sve HQ nebo\rznic vsechny nepratelske jednotky.\fVic k vitezstvi netreba!\f

en: Capture the enemy lab or defeat all\rthe enemy forces within 15 days!\fThat's what it takes to win here!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelskou lab nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily do 15 dni!\fTo je cesta k vitezstvi!\f

en: At last, the factory battle!\rDestroy that pipe to claim the field!\f
cz: Konecne, bitva o tovarnu!\rZnic to potrubi a obsad pole!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or defeat\rall the enemy forces for victory!\fGood luck!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily a vyhrajes!\fHodne stesti!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or destroy\rthe 8 minicannons to win the day!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo znic\r8 minidel a zvitezis!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or defeat\rall the enemy forces for victory!\fGood luck!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily a vyhrajes!\fHodne stesti!\f

en: Destroy all enemy units, but protect\rthose 10 cities in the upper right!\f
cz: Znic vsechny nepratelske jednotky,\rale chran tech 10 mest vpravo nahore!\f

en: Defeat all the enemy forces before\rthey get to your HQ!\f
cz: Poraz vsechny nepratelske sily,\rnez se dostanou k tvemu HQ!\f

en: Topple the 3 minicannons above\ryour HQ to win this map!\f
cz: Sval 3 minidela nad tvym\rHQ a vyhrajes tuto mapu!\f

en: Capture the enemy lab or defeat all\rthe enemy units within 18 days!\fAre you ready for this challenge?\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelskou lab nebo znic\rvsechny jednotky do 18 dni!\fJsi na tuto vyzvu pripraven?\f

en: It's been a long, hard road, but\rvictory is within our grasp!\fMove out, and crush that pipe!\f
cz: Byla to dlouha, tezka cesta, ale\rvitezstvi je na dosah!\fVpred a znic to potrubi!\f

en: To win the field here, destroy the\r8 minicannons around the enemy HQ.\f
cz: K obsazeni pole znic\r8 minidel kolem neprijatelskeho HQ.\f

en: The 2 Black Cannons must be\rdestroyed to claim victory!\f
cz: K vitezstvi musis znicit\r2 Black Cannony!\f

en: Lash's repair skills are nothing to\rsneeze at...\fYou have 17 days to sink the\rbattleships surrounded by bridges!\f
cz: Lashiny opravarske schopnosti nejsou\rk zahozeni...\fMas 17 dni potopit bitevni\rlode obklopene mosty!\f

en: To win here, destroy the 4 laser\rcannons or capture the enemy HQ!\fLend a hand, Sami!\f
cz: K vitezstvi znic 4 laserova\rdela nebo obsad neprijatelske HQ!\fPomoz, Sami!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or defeat\rall the enemy forces for victory!\fGood luck!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily a vyhrajes!\fHodne stesti!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ, or defeat all\rthe enemy troops. Beware the volcano!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny oddily. Pozor na sopku!\f

en: You have 9 days to capture the lab\ror destroy all enemy troops.\fYou can do it!\f
cz: Mas 9 dni obsadit lab nebo\rznicit vsechny nepratelske oddily.\fZvladnes to!\f

en: Hawke's a formidable foe, but we can\rbeat him if we work together!\fThe key to victory is destroying\rthat pipe to the factory!\f
cz: Hawke je obavany nepritel, ale\rspolecne ho porazime!\fKlicem k vitezstvi je znicit\rto potrubi k tovarne!\f

en: Take out the 3 Black Cannons to\rclaim victory here!\f
We're here at last! You've all\rfought so hard for this day.\fDestroy the Deathray within 30\rdays to end this once and for all!\f
cz: Konecne jsme tu! Vsichni jste\rtvrde bojovali pro tento den.\fZnic Deathray do 30 dni a\rukonci to jednou provzdy!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or defeat\rall the enemy forces for victory!\fGood luck!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily a vyhrajes!\fHodne stesti!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or defeat\rall the enemy forces for victory!\fMake us proud!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily a vyhrajes!\fUcin nam radost!\f

en: Topple the Black Cannon to win here!\rThere's no need to panic.\fFocus on the objective and move out!\f
cz: Sval Black Cannon a zvitezis!\rNeni treba panikarit.\fSoustred se na cil a vpred!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or defeat\rall the enemy forces for victory!\fGood luck!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily a vyhrajes!\fHodne stesti!\f

en: Victory's all yours if you defeat\rall the enemy troops! Let 'em have it!\f
cz: Vitezstvi je tve, kdyz porazis\rvsechny oddily! Dej jim na frak!\f

en: To win here, defeat all the enemy\rtroops. Pay attention to those woods!\f
cz: K vitezstvi poraz vsechny\rnepratelske oddily. Pozor na ten les!\f

en: Capture the enemy lab or defeat all\rthe enemy units within 7 days!\fThose are your options!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelskou lab nebo znic\rvsechny jednotky do 7 dni!\fTo jsou tve moznosti!\f

en: All you need to worry about here\ris that factory! Destroy it!\f
cz: Stara se musis jen o tu\rtovarnu! Znic ji!\f
